title: alternative_twilight
description: Added more mechanisms to the bosses of Twilight Forest, making it more time to prepare for them
body:
This module adds more mechanisms to the boss of Twilight Forest, allowing players to make more preparations to guide them.

Added damage to explosion damage and self-destructive words to Twilight Evil Soul. Deals magic damage to creatures around a wide range of around them with 170% of their maximum health.

Added damage reduction and destructible head for Naga, which cancels damage reduction and gives an odds of anger collision

Added life-saving skills to the Lich, making its stage more difficult. In the second and third stages, you will not be easily killed. It is recommended to carry the treatment potion to pass through one stage quickly

Added damage reduction to Minoxin to its current target.

Added a damage increase and damage reduction mechanism linked to player luck to Hydra.

Added a unique counterattack effect to the Phantom Knight, making it more difficult for players to forcibly kill the Phantom Knight without a brown body.

Added a skill to the snow monster leader to place the fine snow.

Added a freezing trap for the Snow Queen to force players to move flexibly.

Added two foods that can give lucky effects
